title: stelis wagneri
intro: Stelis wagneri, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Stelis wagneri has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Stelis wagneri include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve wound healing, and act as an antiseptic. Stelis wagneri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
